name: agent-website-design-skills
description: Open-source AI agent skills for website design, landing pages, design systems, responsive UI QA, accessibility, and conversion polish.

skills.name: web-visual-direction
skills.default_prompt: Use $web-visual-direction to define the visual direction for this website.

skills.name: web-design-system
skills.default_prompt: Use $web-design-system to create a practical design system for this site.

skills.name: landing-page-craft
skills.default_prompt: Use $landing-page-craft to design and implement a strong landing page.

skills.name: responsive-ui-qa
skills.default_prompt: Use $responsive-ui-qa to inspect and fix responsive UI issues.

skills.name: conversion-accessibility-polish
skills.default_prompt: Use $conversion-accessibility-polish to improve this page's conversion and accessibility.
